testcase.name: invalid_login
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. May 10, 2026 7:13:13 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 May 10, 2026 7:13:13 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.139. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.26.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: Locked_login

failure.message: Bug Detected: Password field was NOT cleared after attempting to log into a locked account! expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: VerifyOpeningCheckoutPage
testcase.system-err: May 10, 2026 7:16:56 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 May 10, 2026 7:16:56 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.139. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.26.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: VerifyErrorUserCheckoutBug

failure.message: Bug Detected (TC_003): 'error_user' cannot enter data into the Last Name field correctly! expected [Ali] but found []

testcase.name: VerifySpacesInFirstNameRejected

failure.message: Bug Detected (TC_004): System accepted a name consisting only of spaces! expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Bug Detected (TC_004): System accepted a name consisting only of spaces! expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at testcase.name: VerifyFieldMaxBoundary

failure.message: Bug Detected (TC_006): System accepted a 1000-character name without validation! expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Bug Detected (TC_006): System accepted a 1000-character name without validation! expected [false] but found [true] at failure.message: Bug Detected : System allowed numbers inside the First Name field! expected [false] but found [true]
